name: polymath-connector-figma
description: Figma connector: MCP for file/frame/component reads + design-spec-handoff skill that converts a frame into a build-ready spec.

figmaAccessToken.title: Figma personal or OAuth access token
figmaAccessToken.description: From Figma → Settings → Personal access tokens. Use an org/team-scoped token where supported.

figmaTeamId.title: Default Figma team ID
figmaTeamId.description: Optional team scope to narrow file listings.
